title: Trump slams Iran drone attack on cargo ship as ‘foolish’ ceasefire violation

snapshot.title: Trump slams Iran drone attack on cargo ship as ‘foolish’ ceasefire violation
snapshot.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump on Friday slammed Iran for carrying out a drone attack in the Strait of Hormuz, calling it a “foolish” violation of the ceasefire in the Middle East war. “One of the Drones solidly hit the upper deck of a large and very expensive Cargo Carrying Ship” while three others were shot down, Trump posted on his Truth Social platform in an
snapshot.author: Agencies
snapshot.pageTitle: Trump slams Iran drone attack on cargo ship as ‘foolish’ ceasefire violation | Arab News
